Corrected a typo in the tag name <PRICE> to <PRIZE> for the 'Messung des Meridians Gradus' entry, aligning with the consistent naming convention used for all price elements in the document. No additional tags were added as the existing structure was otherwise well-formed, and the unusual Unicode characters in the text content are valid XML characters (likely OCR artifacts from the original source) that do not impact XML validity.
